name: Darkvision
entries: If you have Darkvision, you can see in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} within a specified range as if it were {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} and in {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} within that range as if it were {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB}. You discern colors in that {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} only as shades of gray.
